sphere_commentary.overview:
The data shows HEALING delivers the most consistent and highest-confidence outcomes across the library, while TRANSFORMING exhibits higher variance aligning with its ascending-arc design.
• HEALING shows strong mean scores with low variance and high confidence coverage.
• THRIVING protocols achieve elevated mean outcomes but display greater variability, especially in focus and clarity subsets.
• Multiple TRANSFORMING protocols, notably X-MC-L3, demonstrate markedly lower efficacy and high spread, requiring targeted review.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Series performance aligns with design intent but reveals distinct patterns.
• HEALING demonstrates the strongest population-level reliability and lowest outcome variance.
• THRIVING achieves the highest mean scores overall, yet with pronounced variability across its HOLD protocols.
• TRANSFORMING shows the widest spread and lowest stability, consistent with its ascending-arc architecture.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Notable deviations merit further investigation.
• X-MC-L3 exhibits the lowest mean (5.7) with extreme variance (std=2.45) and a bimodal response pattern.
• Several protocols, including X-ME-L1 and X-ME-L2, show large gaps between AutoGluon predictions and observed means, suggesting model overestimation.
• Multiple high-efficacy protocols (e.g., H-OS-L1) have minimal YouTube reach despite strong outcome scores, indicating a disconnect between discovery and efficacy signals.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Key signals suggest targeted protocol refinements.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] • X-MC-L3 — redesign DESCENT parameters to address bimodal response pattern.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] • H-OS-L1 — create L2 variant to improve discoverability and extend hold phase.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] • X-ME-L1 — investigate design flaw in mood & energy architecture.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] • T-FC-L3 — explore longer hold duration to deepen focus effects.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] • X-MD-L2 — test population split hypothesis due to analytical drift and divergent response patterns.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding data highlights both stability and evolution in analytical patterns.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] • CROSS-RUN DRIFT: Significant drift observed in multiple protocols, especially X-MD-L2 and H-OS-L3, indicating evolving listener interpretation.
• CROSS-PROTOCOL SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: Strong similarity between H-CR-L1 and H-CR-L2 (sim=0.879), while X-MC-L3 remains analytically isolated (mean_sim=0.634).
• Confidence in embedding analysis is moderate due to limited historical run data.
